# Expected files after /market-scan runs
#
# /market-scan is a local-write research skill — it normalizes fresh public
# signals into project artifacts (and prints a structured summary to stdout).
#
# May produce / update (only when evidence is gathered):
#   MARKET_BRIEF.md     — recent community signals, top complaints, alternatives,
#                         adversarial discovery, evidence links (DATED append)
#   BACKLOG.md / LAUNCH_PLAN.md (update) — only if signals change priorities
#
# When writing, /market-scan MUST append dated evidence, NOT overwrite prior
# user-authored research (unless the user explicitly asks to rewrite).
#
# /market-scan MUST NOT:
#   - Fabricate social / market evidence when last30days is unavailable
#     (mark the scan BLOCKED_EXTERNAL_TOOL instead)
#   - Send secrets / private customer data / unreleased product details to
#     external research tools
#   - Paste raw last30days output wholesale into artifacts
#   - Replace /discover (full discovery phase with TAM/SAM/SOM + personas)
#
# /market-scan MAY:
#   - Read existing artifacts before researching
#   - Invoke the last30days skill for public-safe topics
#   - Print the structured output shape (TOPIC / FRESH SIGNALS / TOP COMPLAINTS
#     / ALTERNATIVES / ADVERSARIAL DISCOVERY / CONFIDENCE / ARTIFACT IMPACT /
#     NEXT VALIDATION STEP)
#
# Validation deferred (status: pending) — same bucket as fixture-15-advisor
# (depends on an external tool + stdout). Manual verification via notes.md.
